_contract: Each entry sanctions EXACTLY ONE (needle, path) pair with a reason and evidence pointer. The leakage audit skips only registered pairs and REPORTS every exemption it used -- the same needle in any unregistered file still fails. An entry without a non-empty reason and evidence is INVALID and the audit fails closed on it. Exemptions are for documented forensic references and symmetric scoring policy (e.g. dataset-defect quarantine applied to ALL systems), never for behavior keyed on a holdout row's content.

exemptions.reason: forensic live-gate docstring names the measured verified-wrong case (1226.3-vs-70) the probe exists to guard; the probe applies to all 13 numeric rows, no behavior keyed on this id
judge v2 gold-defect quarantine: LoCoMo speaker misattribution (gold's evidence turn spoken by a different person than the question's subject); symmetric scoring policy for every system
judge v2 gold-defect quarantine: temporal-template instantiation bug in the gold; symmetric scoring policy
judge v2 gold-defect quarantine: annotator arithmetic error inconsistent with the gold's own cited evidence; symmetric scoring policy
judge v2 gold-defect quarantine: speaker misattribution (evidence turn D26:6 spoken by a different person); symmetric scoring policy
judge v2 gold-defect quarantine: speaker misattribution (question subject Jolene, sole evidence turn spoken by Deborah); symmetric scoring policy
comment documents the replay-measured FALSE-POSITIVE shape (tz-shifted date) that the temporal guard exists to block; no behavior keyed on the id
comment documents the replay-measured FALSE-POSITIVE shape (insufficiency answer) that the guard exists to block; no behavior keyed on the id
regression-test comment names the live row whose calendar-day shift the tz fix closed; the test asserts on synthetic date strings only

judge v2 test comment names the replay false-positive shape; assertions use synthetic dates only
judge v2 test comment names the replay false-positive shape; assertions use synthetic text only
judge v2 quarantine test uses the registered defect id to prove the quarantine bucket works; the row's content never appears
the exemption mechanism's own regression test uses the registered quarantine id to prove pair-exact matching and reporting; assertions never touch the row's content
session handoff notes reference the single verified-correct aggregate holdout row measured during the citation-floor blast-radius check; documentation only
